LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WOLFGANG SOLZER AND SOLZER & HAIL, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT ON CONDITION OF THE PAYING OF THE $1,500.00 AS INDICATED IN THE NEXT SENTENCE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT TO PAY $1,500.00 AS REASONABLE FEES APPLICABLE TO PLAINTIFF OBTAINING DEFAULT. GRANT APPLICATION TO FILE AMENDED ANSWER AND CROSS-COMPLAINT. CERTAIN OF THE CLAIMS ARE COMPULSORY AND C.C.P. SECTION 426.50 FAVORS GRANTING AMENDMENTS WHERE THE CLAIMS ARE COMPULSORY. GIVEN THAT, IT MAKES SENSE TO RESOLVE ALL OF THE PARTIES' DISPUTES AT ONE TIME. MR. TICE TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WOLFGANG SOLZER AND SOLZER & HAIL, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
APPEARANCES: ROSS DREYER, ESQUIRE (LIPPENBERGER THOMPSON WELCH SOROKO & GILBERT, 415.927.5200) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. WALLACE M. TICE, ESQUIRE (LYNCH GILARDI & GRUMMER, 415.397.2800) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT ON CONDITION OF THE PAYING OF THE $1,500.00 AS INDICATED IN THE NEXT SENTENCE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT TO PAY $1,500.00 AS REASONABLE FEES APPLICABLE TO PLAINTIFF OBTAINING DEFAULT. GRANT APPLICATION TO FILE AMENDED ANSWER AND CROSS-COMPLAINT. CERTAIN OF THE CLAIMS ARE COMPULSORY AND C.C.P. SECTION 426.50 FAVORS GRANTING AMENDMENTS WHERE THE CLAIMS ARE COMPULSORY. GIVEN THAT, IT MAKES SENSE TO RESOLVE ALL OF THE PARTIES' DISPUTES AT ONE TIME. MR. TICE TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.
